title: pyrus pseudopashia
intro: Pyrus pseudopashia, also known as the Chinese rowan or hawthorn-leaved rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. Its bark, leaves, and fruits have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain cancers. Pyrus pseudopashia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used to make traditional Chinese medicine formulas, including tablets and capsules.
